remarks: A rare 1,359 sq. ft. urban sanctuary!  This luxury 3BR/2BA residence at Eastside Commons is one of the largest floor plans in this desirable gated mid-rise community. Freshly repainted and updated, this 4th floor home offers an open-concept layout that flows seamlessly from the kitchen-featuring an expansive granite island-into the bright living and dining areas, ideal for entertaining. Elegant, recessed lighting spans the living, dining, and laundry areas. The three bedrooms feature elegant wall-to-wall carpeting in a contemporary neutral tone, while luxury vinyl plank (LVP) flooring and freshly painted white walls create a bright, modern interior. Step onto your private balcony to relax and unwind. The spacious primary suite features a large walk-in closet. Recent upgrades include a brand-new high-efficiency water boiler/AC system, new kitchen sink plumbing valves, an updated toilet system, and new window blinds. The unit also includes a dedicated private storage room outside the residence. Enjoy resort-style amenities including a fully equipped fitness center, reserved resident parking, visitor parking, and a charming cottage-style courtyard with grills and seating, creating a garden retreat. Perfectly located in the heart of Mid-City Stamford, walk to downtown restaurants, the Ferguson Library, Macy's, and the Stamford Palace Theatre. Nearby parks, & beaches complete this exceptional lifestyle.  A commuter's dream, just 45 miles from NYC. Schedule your private tour t
